GDD Project

This project is in progress, but will be displayed here upon completion. Check back soon for updates!

UnityC
Gitlet

Created Git-like version control system that uses custom data structures called “blobs” to track file modifications in a directory over time, allowing users to save snapshots of their files and restore them to any previous state. Used cryptographic hash function to uniquely label blobs and maintained a history of mappings between saves and blobs, simulating a tree structure that enables users to extend and branch their modification history memory-efficiently.

JavaGitGithub
Pacman

Implemented Pacman using various Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning techniques such as minimax, expectimax, value iteration, Q-learning, and a neural network to simulate player decision-making.

PythonArtificial IntelligenceMachine Learning
Rocky's Mystery Dungeon

A recreation of Pokemon Mystery Dungeon. Developed a dungeon-crawler with a custom application GUI where the player navigates a sequence of randomly generated 2D worlds while fighting off enemies. Implemented AI pathfinding for enemies, the ability to save and load previous games, and dynamic world rendering options.

JavaArtificial Intelligence
